name: Spreadshirt Public Shop API
description: Spreadshirt Public Shop API for custom merchandise and print-on-demand. Access product catalogs, manage orders, and integrate custom shop functionality. API follows REST principles with support for both EU and NA regions. All requests require SprdAuth authentication with apiKey and User-Agent headers.
